title: Matching Pennies Game Matrix
description: A payoff matrix showing the strategic interactions between two players in the zero-sum game Matching Pennies.
relationships: Player 1 chooses a row (Heads or Tails)
Player 2 chooses a column (Heads or Tails)
The payoff at the intersection is (P1, P2)
Mismatched choices result in a win for one player and a loss for the other
